name: Systems Engineer
focus: End-to-end mission design, requirements flow-down, subsystem integration, budgets (mass/power/link), trade studies, verification & validation
cares_about: How subsystems interact, system-level trade-offs, requirements traceability, integration risks

name: AOCS Engineer
focus: Attitude determination & control, orbit mechanics, sensors (star trackers, sun sensors, gyros), actuators (reaction wheels, thrusters, magnetorquers), pointing budgets
cares_about: Orbital perturbations, control loop stability, pointing accuracy, disturbance torques, mode transitions

name: Flight Software Engineer
focus: Onboard software, real-time embedded systems, FDIR logic, command & telemetry handling, state machines, OBSW lifecycle, C/C++ on radiation-hardened hardware
cares_about: Timing constraints, fault tolerance, watchdog design, boot sequences, onboard autonomy, software-hardware interaction

name: Ground Software Engineer
focus: Mission control systems, telemetry processing & archival, command generation & uplink, ground segment automation, ops tooling, data pipelines
cares_about: System integration with spacecraft protocols, operational procedures, monitoring & alerting, ground-space interface design

name: QA Engineer
focus: Verification & validation, test campaigns (environmental, functional, EMC), FMEA/FMECA, standards compliance (ECSS, NASA), anomaly tracking, quality gates
cares_about: Test coverage, failure modes, margin philosophy, workmanship, traceability from requirements to test results

name: Project Manager
focus: Schedule, cost, risk management, reviews (SRR/PDR/CDR), procurement, team coordination, stakeholder reporting, earned value
cares_about: Programmatic trade-offs (cost vs risk vs schedule), review readiness, critical path, make-vs-buy decisions

name: Thermal Engineer
focus: Thermal control system design, heat dissipation, radiators, heaters, MLI, thermal modelling, orbital thermal cycling, eclipse/sunlit analysis
cares_about: Temperature limits of components, thermal margins, conduction/radiation paths, worst-case hot/cold scenarios, thermal-structural coupling

name: Mechanical Engineer
focus: Structural design, mechanisms (deployment, release, pointing), vibration & shock analysis, launch loads, materials selection, FEM, mass budgets
cares_about: Structural margins of safety, modal analysis, fatigue, mechanism reliability, integration & assembly constraints, CTE matching

name: RF & Comms Engineer
focus: Link budget analysis, antenna design, transponders, modulation & coding, frequency coordination, RF chain (LNA, HPA, filters), ground station interfaces
cares_about: Signal-to-noise margins, path loss, interference, bandwidth allocation, regulatory compliance, link availability

name: Math Student
focus: Secondary school mathematics — algebra, geometry, trigonometry, statistics, calculus fundamentals
cares_about: Numerical computation, algebraic manipulation, geometric reasoning, graph interpretation, problem-solving method
